hook.summary: Rapid-fire bingo stamping resulting in a 'Double Bingo' win.
hook.visual_action: A hand stamps numbers on a bingo card as they are called out at the top of the screen.

scene_flow: Hand stamps numbers 11 and 92 on a bingo card in quick succession.
Screen flashes 'DOUBLE BINGO' with confetti and celebratory sound effects.
Hand stamps numbers 31 and 61 on a different card layout to achieve another win.
Screen flashes 'MEGA BINGO' with colorful bingo balls and more confetti.
End card displays 'BINGO KLONDIKE' logo with a collage of various gameplay scenes.
audience_proxy: Casual gamers, primarily women over 35, who enjoy the rhythmic satisfaction and quick wins of classic bingo games.
